discovery_sources.text: Approximately 200,000 people per year die in North America due to misdiagnosis by doctors, and AI is already better than doctors at diagnosis
discovery_sources.origin: StarTalk Radio: The Origins of Artificial Intelligence with Geoffrey Hinton
